---
title: "Bayesian Workflow book: Errata"
date: 2026-02-26
date-modified: today
date-format: iso
format:
  html:
    number-sections: false
---

Errata (excluding minor typos) for the book.

::: {.content-visible when-profile="draft"}

*The book has not yet been printed*

:::

::: {.content-visible unless-profile="draft"}

If you notice an error that is not mentioned in [the errata](errata.html), [submit an issue](https://github.com/avehtari/Bayesian-Workflow/issues) or send an email.

:::
